books.name: Ritual Echoes
books.description: When Detective Kael Voss is called to a murder scene sealed by wards that haven't been cast in centuries, he's pulled into a conspiracy that threads through the city's occult underground. The victim is his mother. The magic is someone else's.

books.name: Shadow Circuit
books.description: A dead hacker. A spell etched into source code. Kael follows the trail into the Grid — the city's hidden magical network — where data and sorcery merge, and someone is rewriting the rules of both.

books.name: Venom Ward
books.description: The wards protecting the city are failing, and the poison seeping through carries a familiar signature. Kael must confront the architect behind it all — even if the truth destroys the fragile peace he's built.
